extension_description.message: Professional local browser audio enhancer with parametric EQ, dynamics, harmonics, stereo width, and limiting.

privacy_notice_body.message: Tab audio is processed only on this device and is never recorded or uploaded. When per-site preferences are used, the current site hostname may be stored locally in this Chrome profile.

local_audio_hint.message: Audio is processed locally. No recording, no upload.

support_description.message: ArSonKuPik stays fully functional and free. After 90 days of use, this optional reminder helps fund continued DSP development, testing, and support.

support_description_before_studio.message: Studio remains fully free. Scan QRIS only when you would like to support continued DSP development, then continue immediately.

support_qris_alt.message: Static QRIS for voluntary SonkuPik support

support_local_note.message: Payments are not tracked by the extension. “I’ve supported” only hides this reminder on the current Chrome profile.

accept_privacy_first.message: Accept the local-processing privacy notice before starting audio enhancement.

moving_capture.message: Moving capture to this active tab…

switching_power.message: Switching enhance power without reopening YouTube audio…

privacy_accepted.message: Privacy notice accepted. Audio remains local to this device.

confirm_clear_sites.message: Clear all saved per-site enhancement preferences? Custom presets will be kept.

sites_cleared.message: Saved site preferences cleared. Custom presets were kept.

confirm_reset_data.message: Reset all ArSonKuPik local data? This removes custom presets, settings, site preferences, and privacy consent.

data_reset.message: All local data was reset. Review the privacy notice before using audio enhancement again.

support_thanks.message: Thank you for supporting SonkuPik. This reminder is disabled on this Chrome profile.

enhance_kept_warm.message: Enhance off. Capture kept warm so YouTube does not renegotiate playback.

enhance_reusing_capture.message: Enhance on. Reusing the same capture stream.

attach_current_title.message: Attach ArSonKuPik to the current active tab and release the previous capture stream.

active_button_title.message: Click toggles mastering bypass without reopening capture. Shift-click releases tab capture fully.

start_button_title.message: Start local tab capture and audio enhancement.

accept_button_title.message: Accept the local-processing privacy notice before starting.

another_tab_hint_remembered.message: Enhance is attached to another tab; {{domain}} is remembered. Click Enhance This Tab to move it here.

another_tab_hint.message: Enhance is attached to another tab. Click Enhance This Tab to move it here.

warm_capture_hint.message: Enhance is off but capture is kept warm to avoid YouTube buffering.

remembered_domain_hint.message: Enhancer remembered for {{domain}}. Click Start Enhance to attach this tab.

local_data_summary.message: {{sites}} site preference{{siteSuffix}} · {{presets}} custom preset{{presetSuffix}} stored locally.

reset_preset_title.message: Reset to Mas Ari Signature preset

master_fx_active.message: Master FX active — click to bypass all FX

global_input_meter.message: Global input audio stereo level meter

global_output_meter.message: Global output audio stereo level meter

no_band_selected.message: No band selected — double-click the display to add one

compressor_curve_meter.message: Compressor transfer curve with linked stereo gain reduction meter

limiter_meters.message: Limiter input and output stereo meters

target_gr_note.message: Target GR 0–3 dB · warning above 6 dB

hardware_guide_title.message: Choose an interface that preserves the mastering chain.

hardware_guide_lead.message: For reliable external playback, prioritize stable drivers and clean conversion over marketing features.

driver_stability_desc.message: Native WASAPI support, dependable reconnect behavior, and current manufacturer drivers.

clean_conversion_desc.message: 24-bit playback, low output noise, and enough headroom for dynamic material.

practical_io_desc.message: Balanced outputs for monitors, a dedicated headphone path, and physical level control.

routing_support_desc.message: Use System Default when browser output selection is unavailable; ArSonKuPik never requests microphone access for speaker routing.

hardware_disclosure.message: Not sponsored. No affiliate links. No third-party product image or endorsement is bundled with ArSonKuPik.

save_custom_preset_desc.message: Current EQ, compressor, color, width and limiter settings will be saved locally.

click_toggle_module.message: Click to bypass or enable this module.

attach_studio_title.message: Attach Studio to its source tab and release the previous capture stream.

ab_compare_title.message: A/B compare — active slot {{slot}}. Click to snapshot this slot and switch.

ab_compare_aria.message: A/B compare active slot {{slot}}. Toggle between temporary A and B snapshots.

performance_stable_desc.message: STABLE: conservative analysis and maximum playback reliability

performance_turbo_desc.message: TURBO: adaptive processing with higher analysis activity

performance_eco_desc.message: ECO: lighter audio graph and minimum background activity

master_bypass_active.message: Master FX active — click to bypass all FX

master_bypass_bypassed.message: Master FX bypassed — click to enable all FX

performance_stable_full.message: Engine quality: STABLE — full sound with lighter analysis for reliable playback

performance_turbo_full.message: Engine quality: TURBO — oversampled adaptive processing for powerful computers

performance_eco_full.message: Engine quality: ECO — simplified processing for low-spec computers

master_bypass_enabled.message: Master bypass is enabled — click to reactivate all FX
